__NOTOC__

<!-- Hero Section -->
<div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px; background: #e6f0ff; border: 1px solid #ddd;">
== Welcome to SuperMemo 19 ==
Master anything with the world’s leading learning system, backed by decades of memory science.<br />
[[Introduction|Take a 3-Minute Tour]] | [https://youtu.be/DoQoeK53bP8 Watch the Intro Video]
</div>

<!-- Featured Image -->
<div style="text-align: center; margin: 20px 0;">
[[File:SuperMemo 19 with dual monitor support.jpg|center|500px|alt=SuperMemo 19 running on dual monitors|SuperMemo 19 for Windows at the Professional level running on two monitors]]
</div>

<!-- Main Sections -->
{| style="width: 100%; margin: 20px 0;"
|-
| style="width: 33%; vertical-align: top; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ddd;" |
=== Get Started ===
<div style="background: #f0f7ff; padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Explore SuperMemo</div>
* [[SuperMemo|What is SuperMemo?]]
* [[Features|Key Features]]
* [[What's new in SuperMemo?|What’s New in SuperMemo 19]]
* [[SuperMemo Screenshot Tour|See It in Action]] (Screen Tour)
* [[Minimum requirements|System Requirements]]
* [https://www.super-memory.com/help/faq/before.htm FAQ: Before You Buy]

| style="width: 33%; vertical-align: top; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ddd;" |

=== Learn SuperMemo ===
<div style="background: #f0f7ff; padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Start Learning</div>
* [[Installing SuperMemo (in a minute)|Install in 1 Minute]]
* [[Introduction|Beginner’s Guide (3 min)]]
* [[Step-by-step to SuperMemo mastery|Mastery Course (1 month)]]
* [[Incremental learning|Incremental Learning]]
* [[Hints&Tips|Quick Tips]]
* [https://supermemo.guru/wiki/20_rules_of_knowledge_formulation 20 Rules for Learning]

| style="width: 33%; vertical-align: top; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ddd;" |

=== Support & Resources ===
<div style="background: #f0f7ff; padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;">Get Help</div>
* [[Menus, buttons, dialogs, etc.|Interface Guide]] (menus, windows and buttons)
* [[Overview articles|How-To Guides]]
* [https://supermemopedia.com/wiki/FAQ FAQs]
* [[Technical support|Contact Support]]
<div style="background: #f0f7ff; padding: 5px; margin: 10px 0;">Video</div>
* [https://www.youtube.com/@SuperMemoVideo Video Tutorials ('''SuperMemo Video''')]
* [https://www.youtube.com/@PleasurableLearning Video Tips & Overviews ('''Pleasurable Learning''')]
* [https://supermemopedia.com/wiki/The_Pleasurable_Guide_To_SuperMemo Guide to SuperMemo course at "Pleasurable learning"]

|}

<!-- Call to Action -->
<div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px; background: #e6f0ff; border: 1px solid #ddd;">

== Ready to Transform Your Learning? ==
Join thousands of learners using SuperMemo to master new skills.<br />
[https://super-memory.com/english/down.htm Download Now]
</div>

<!-- Footer -->
<div style="font-size: 90%; color: #666; text-align: center; margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #ddd;">
Need help with an older version? Check our [https://help18.supermemo.org/wiki/SuperMemo_18_Help archive].<br />
Have ideas? [[Feature request|Share your feedback]].
</div>
